mnemonics: Message Call Transaction: My Computer Talks (MCT)
keyPoints: It is an internal transaction that does not transfer Ether, but executes code within a smart contract.
It is triggered by another contract or an external account to invoke a function.
It changes the state of the contract on the blockchain but is not recorded as a separate transaction on its own.
commonMistakes: Confusing it with a value-bearing Ether transfer; it is a data/function call with 'value' set to zero.
Thinking it creates a new transaction hash; it is an internal action recorded within the parent transaction's receipt.
